rationale.R1.1: Minor issue with conceptual framing, as the introduction could be more focused.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty positioning of Linot is not clearly contrasted with existing work, and the 'key technical insight' needs to be more explicitly connected to prior art.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence-level prose issues are present throughout the text, including run-on sentences and hedging language.
